title: Values, Expressions, Names, and Types · Language Clinic: Python Assignment Unpacking
summary: Build a transparent unit and budget calculator whose intermediate values can be inspected and tested. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python assignment unpacking increment in an inspectable unit and budget calculator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use multiple assignment, unpacking, starred targets, and constants conventions without obscuring data shape.
Convert external text to typed values with explicit validation and recoverable failure behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
